title: papaver rhoeas
intro: Papaver rhoeas, also known as the common poppy or corn poppy, is a flowering plant native to Europe, Western Asia, and North Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its analgesic, antispasmodic, and sedative effects, which are due to the presence of alkaloids such as papaverine and thebaine. The health benefits of Papaver rhoeas include its ability to reduce pain, relieve anxiety and insomnia, and act as an antispasmodic to alleviate muscle cramps and spasms. The herbal preparations of Papaver rhoeas include tinctures, infusions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from pain management to skin issues.
